name: Kid Ball Adventure
short_description: A platformer with excellent level design that's unforgiving. With two buttons, overcome 100 levels filled with traps, enemies, dangerous situations, and bosses. Test your patience and precision. If you're looking for a challenge, this is your game.
detailed_description:
Kid Ball Adventure

Do you think you have the skill to overcome a true platforming challenge?
Kid Ball Adventure doesn’t forgive mistakes. With just two buttons, you’ll face over 100 levels packed with traps, enemies, and bosses designed to push your precision, reflexes, and patience to the limit.

This is not a game to casually pass the time. It’s a challenge crafted for those who enjoy conquering the impossible, for those who see every fall as just another chance to try again… until they become true masters of the jump.

Key Features

  • Simple controls, constantly rising difficulty: two buttons that will push your precision to the edge.

  • 100 challenging levels filled with traps, enemies, precision situations, and bosses designed to make you sweat.

  • Every jump matters: master the arc to progress through increasingly demanding stages.

  • 3 time attack modes for the most competitive players: Classic, No Death, and Infernal Day.

  • Charming visual style across fantastic worlds full of dangers.

  • Controller or keyboard support: play however you want—you’ll suffer all the same.

  • Original soundtrack that fuels every victory and every defeat.

Time Attack Mode: Can You Master It?

Beating the normal mode is only the beginning.
In time attack modes, you’ll need to memorize every level, optimize impossible jumps, and find the perfect route to achieve the best times.

  • Classic: pure speed.

  • No Death: one mistake and it’s back to the start.

  • Infernal Day: the ultimate challenge for the most stubborn players.

For True Challenge Hunters

Kid Ball Adventure is made for players who don’t give up.
If you’re looking for a challenging, demanding, and addictive indie platformer, this is your battlefield.

Get ready for a journey where every level will test your skills, and every victory will feel like a true achievement.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian
